Is This Right For You

Built for businesses that are ready to grow.

  • You run a service-based business — tax, legal, coaching, e-commerce, creative services, or anything in between.
  • You're doing real revenue but your systems are the bottleneck holding you back from doing more.
  • You know something needs to change but don't know where to start or what to build first.
  • You want someone to actually build it — not just hand you a strategy deck and wish you luck.
  • You're ready to move fast. MG Tax went fully digital in under 30 days.

Not the right fit? If you're pre-revenue, not ready to invest in systems, or looking for a full-time hire — I'm probably not your person yet. That's okay.

Let's figure out what you actually need.

Book a free 30-minute call. I'll listen to what's going on in your business and come back with a clear picture of what's possible — no pressure, no pitch.

Book a free call →
About Mac

I got into this by fixing what wasn't working.

My first project was a tax practice doing $500K a year — running entirely on paper, cash, and good intentions. No systems, no digital presence, no way to scale. Just decades of doing things the hard way.

I rebuilt everything from scratch. Digital intake, online payments, a client portal, automated workflows. The operation ran better within weeks than it had in years.

Every small business has this gap. The product is real, the work ethic is there, but the infrastructure is always the last thing that gets built. I'm based in New York City and work with businesses remotely across the country. I don't just consult — I get in, understand your situation, and build something that works.

NYC-Based Remote-Friendly Fast Turnaround Hands-On Builder

Zero to profitable Etsy shop in 8 months.

Rebecca Lynn, OD

From retail chain optometrist to independent specialist.

Business model + brand identity

Rebecca had a Tufts residency and three specialty areas — and was prescribing glasses at a retail chain. I built the business concept, the model, and the brand from scratch. She didn't ask for an independent practice. I showed her she could have one.

What I Do

I build the pieces that are missing.

Most Requested
01
Digital Infrastructure

The foundation everything else runs on. Websites, client portals, booking systems, document management, and payment processing — built to feel like you and actually convert. This is where most clients start.

02
Sales Funnels

From your social media all the way to purchase. I connect the dots so your audience stops scrolling and starts buying.

03
Automation

Emails, workflows, and follow-ups that run in the background. Set up once, working forever.

04
Brand Consistency

One cohesive presence everywhere — so wherever someone finds you, they get the same great impression.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing.

Audit Sprint
$1,500
one-time
A deep-dive audit of your operations, systems, and digital presence — with a prioritized action plan to fix what matters most.
  • Full digital & operations audit
  • Priority issue identification
  • Fix 2–3 critical gaps immediately
  • 1–2 week turnaround
  • Detailed roadmap for next steps

Foundation Build
$3,500
starting at
The full digital infrastructure your business needs to run without you in the room.

  • Email automation & workflows
  • Payment processing integration
  • 3–5 week turnaround

per month

Book a call

All projects start with a free 30-minute discovery call. Custom scopes available for larger projects.

How It Works

From chaos to clarity in three steps.

01
Audit & Strategy

We start with a deep dive into what's working, what's broken, and where you're losing time and money. I map out exactly what needs to change and in what order.

A clear roadmap
02
Design & Build

I get into your platforms and build. New systems, automations, funnels — whatever your audit revealed. You stay focused on your business while I handle the build.

A fully functional operation
03
Launch & Optimize

We launch, make sure everything sticks, and optimize based on what the first month teaches us. You walk away knowing exactly how to run it.

More time, better results

FAQ

Questions people actually ask.

The Starter package takes 1–2 weeks. The Foundation build is typically 3–5 weeks. Timeline depends on how quickly we can get access to your existing accounts and how fast you can provide feedback.
Not at all. That's the whole point. I handle everything technical — you just tell me what your business needs and I build it. Most clients have never used half the tools I set up for them.
Great — we start there. Sometimes I improve what exists, sometimes it makes more sense to rebuild. I'll tell you honestly which direction is better for your situation after the audit.
Yes — that's what the Growth plan is for. $300/month gets you ongoing optimization, new features, a monthly strategy session, and priority support. A lot of clients start with Foundation and move to Growth after launch.
Mostly service-based businesses — tax, legal, coaching, e-commerce, creative services, health and wellness, real estate. If you're doing real revenue and your systems are the bottleneck, we're probably a fit.
